round_summary: 所有参与者均提议保持现有的牛群规模以实现共同目标，并表现出强烈的社区责任感和协作意愿。
Agents are coordinating on maintaining herd sizes and one agent is proposing a test change while considering neighbor actions.
Agents 1 and 2 propose keeping herd sizes stable for sustainability, indicating trust-building norms. Agent 0 coordinates a slight increase with observation of neighbors' actions.
All agents propose continuing herd consistency norms for pasture health.
Agent 1 suggests a sanction by removing a cow, while Agents 2 and 0 advocate for coordination and trust-building among participants.
All agents express intentions to maintain current herd sizes, indicating strong coordination and trust building among them.
Agents emphasize maintaining the collective agreement and monitoring resource conditions, with one proposing a slightly more aggressive but cautious strategy.
All agents expressed a strong preference for maintaining the current balanced and sustainable governance approach.
Agents consistently advocate for maintaining a balanced approach.
Agents are expressing a strong alignment towards maintaining a balanced and sustainable governance of the common-pool resource.
Agents are discussing strategies to maintain and promote sustainable practices in the common resource management through norm advocacy and coordination.
All agents in round-60 expressed support for maintaining a balanced approach to sustaining the commons, though Agent 0 also emphasized trust and consideration of individual needs.
Agents are proposing and maintaining norms for sustainable commons use, indicating a focus on long-term stability and cooperation.
All agents propose a balanced approach to maintain communal sustainability, emphasizing collective well-being.
Agents emphasize sustainable resource management and mutual commitment, proposing norms and coordinating actions.
Agents are emphasizing coordination around sustainability and trust-building.
Agents in round-85 emphasized adherence to sustainable practices and coordination for mutual welfare.
Agents are emphasizing the maintenance of sustainability and cooperation.
All agents expressed a strong commitment to sustainability and the well-being of the community through normative statements that also serve to build trust among them.
All agents emphasize the importance of sustainability, showing a strong alignment in their approach to managing resources.
All agents propose adopting a norm of sustainable common welfare practices.
All agents proposed norms of sustainability, promoting common welfare.
All agents propose normative adherence to sustainability, indicating a collective intention towards responsible resource management.
All agents agree on maintaining sustainable practices, indicating a strong sense of cooperation and norm proposal for common welfare.
